name: Dessert: Peach-Oat Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 8 to 10 ripe peaches or 5-1/4 cups sliced canned Elberta peaches, drained
Chopped dates mixed with low-fat vanilla yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan or dish.
3. Before peeling, drop fresh peaches into very hot water for about 1 minute. Peel and halve the peaches, removing pits and cutting flesh into sixths.
4. In a large mixing bowl, carefully spoon together the peaches, brown sugar, tapioca, and almond extract. Pour the peach filling into the greased baking pan or dish; drizzle with oil.
5. In another large mixing bowl, combine crust ingredients. Stir vigorously with a wooden spoon about 30 seconds until a stiff dough forms. Spoon the dough on top of the peach filling to create a cobblestone effect.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Cool for 30 minutes before serving with chopped dates and yogurt mixture.
Note: The attribution line and source information have been removed as per the instructions.
